allow: Bash(python -c "import bcrypt; pwd = b'123456'; hashed = bcrypt.hashpw\(pwd, bcrypt.gensalt\(12\)\); print\(hashed.decode\(\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import bcrypt; pwd = b'123456'; hashed = bcrypt.hashpw\(pwd, bcrypt.gensalt\(12\)\); print\(hashed.decode\(\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\('bcryptjs'\); const hash = bcrypt.hashSync\('123456', 12\); console.log\(hash\);")
Bash(node -e "const bcrypt = require\('bcrypt'\); const hash = bcrypt.hashSync\('123456', 12\); console.log\(hash\);")
